title: Black Woman
materials: Natural wood veneer marquetry on birch panel
framed: Unframed — arrives ready to hang or frame
shipping: White-glove fine art courier, worldwide, fully insured in transit
story: A study in luminosity and dignity. Every veneer piece in this portrait was selected for the way it carries light — pale ash pieces in the foreground giving way to deeper walnut shadows that model the face with a painter's precision. The warmth of the natural wood tones does what pigment cannot: it is a warmth that already existed inside the material, waiting to be revealed. This work began as a commission and became something larger.
